Video.summary: Suffering has deep social causes. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains how your physiology is impacted by stress and social determinants.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Video.summary: Addiction is neither a choice you make or an unavoidable disease. It’s an attempt to solve a problem. The conundrum is… it almost works.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Video.summary: Thousands applied. 40 of the best people were picked and 8 people earned the right to compete for the Grand Prize. Which ONE of them actually Plays to WIN?
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 5

Image.alt: Play To Win- Episode 5
Play To Win- Episode 5
Play To Win- Episode 5

Video.summary: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.
Video.title: Yoga For All Day 1: Notice

Image.alt: Yoga For All Day 1: Notice
Yoga For All Day 1: Notice
Yoga For All Day 1: Notice

Video.summary: Your Day 2 session invites you to use the tools of the at-home yoga practice to befriend your body and your breath. Build on the art of noticing from Day 1 as we expand our vocabulary with a focus on a strong foundation. This session encourages a healthy flow of energy up and down the spine and lovingly guides you to learn how to take responsibility for your experience on the mat.
Video.title: Day 2: Befriend

Image.alt: Day 2: Befriend
Day 2: Befriend
Day 2: Befriend

Video.summary: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.
Video.title: Day 3: Align

Image.alt: Day 3: Align
Day 3: Align
Day 3: Align

Video.summary: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.
Video.title: Day 4: Ease

Image.alt: Day 4: Ease
Day 4: Ease
Day 4: Ease

Video.summary: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 1

Image.alt: Play To Win- Episode 1
Play To Win- Episode 1
Play To Win- Episode 1

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: Did you know being active in the gym could improve your activity in the bedroom? Everything you wanted to ask about sex but didn’t. Now you can on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Video.summary: A man gets terrible headaches right at the height of passion. And a woman won’t talk about her sexual desires. What should her partner do? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex

Video.summary: A man wonders if he should look for love while his wife battles dementia and the classic tale of the G spot gets a rewriting. This week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Video.summary: A man falls asleep during sex. Is it a medical emergency? And could testosterone gel be the cure for painful sex in seniors? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Video.summary: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny

Video.summary: From Hell to Heaven's Doors, From Crime to having Quality Time Author Denise Jones! We are about to get deep in conversation with a young lady that came from the Chicago Crime , drugs and Jail to coming out to finding the light of success and glory! This will take you through the pain and passion of what she and her mom went through, turn your speakers up and get inspired!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Denise Jones

Video.summary: R&B Singer Kerry James influenced by his Icons..So he dedicated a song to his Mom! Kerry James born in Chicago, but moved to the King of Pop Michael Jackson hometown Gary, Indiana and started signing and has been accomplishing many milestones in his life. We had a blast with Kerry and all of the things that he has accomplished and other obstacles! Support this gentleman!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Kerry James

Video.summary: What you all need to know is that we had a blast with Robert Griffin aka Chief 1 Love, was talking about his journey and the love of the game! You are going to hear some great stories and you will have a great time watching!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Robert Griffin

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Robert Griffin
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Robert Griffin
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Robert Griffin

Video.summary: Gives viewers an inside look at the tremendous scientific effort involved in finding effective treatments for Dementia and Alzheimer's Disease.
Video.title: Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory

Image.alt: Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory
Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory
Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory

Video.summary: One of the cleverest ways cancer cells survive is by evading detection from the immune system forces that would otherwise destroy them. In this new episode of Research Detectives, we go inside the laboratory with the scientists who are working to outsmart the cancer cells and expose them. Plus, we take a look at medications and treatments that could force the cancer cells to destroy themselves.
Video.title: Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer

Image.alt: Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer
Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer
Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer

Video.summary: Stomach aches and pains are a common complaint. Here are the signs that the problem could be serious.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Gastro
Dr. Q&A - Gastro
Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Video.summary: Back pain is one of the most common conditions today but there are treatments, exercises, and therapies that can relieve the pain that don’t involve either narcotics or surgery. But if those interventions are needed you want to make sure you have what you need to make an informed decision
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain
Dr. Q&A - Back Pain
Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Video.summary: Alzheimer’s disease affects millions of people around the world, robbing them of their memory and of so much of their lives. There is still no sure but there are some treatments and active clinical trials that are offering promise. In this program, we discuss some of the lifestyle changes people can make to help prevent or at least slow down the progression of Alzheimer’s and stay as mentally healthy as possible.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Video.summary: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Video.summary: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Video.summary: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Video.summary: Elizabeth comes face-to-face with her spiritual guide, Gwen who has an intriguing opportunity for her.
Video.title: The Secrets of the Keys

Image.alt: The Secrets of the Keys
The Secrets of the Keys
